name: Comic Book
description: Bold, colorful comic book style with pop art energy and dynamic typography.

preview.sampleText: Bold panels and explosive action in every page.

classes.h1: text-5xl font-black mb-6 text-red-600 uppercase tracking-wider drop-shadow-[3px_3px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
classes.h2: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-blue-700 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.a: text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 underline decoration-wavy decoration-yellow-400 decoration-2
classes.img: max-w-full my-4 rounded-lg border-4 border-black shadow-[6px_6px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
classes.th: bg-red-600 text-white font-bold uppercase p-3 border-2 border-black
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-red-500 bg-yellow-100 pl-4 py-2 italic my-4 text-gray-900 font-bold rounded-r-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
classes.code: bg-yellow-300 text-red-700 font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border-2 border-black text-sm font-mono
classes.pre: bg-gray-900 text-green-300 p-4 rounded-xl border-4 border-black overflow-x-auto shadow-[6px_6px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.9)]
classes.body: bg-yellow-50 p-8 border-4 border-black shadow-[8px_8px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.9)] rounded-2xl
